title: 403 Forbidden error when uploading n8n template
symptom: Users encounter a '403 Forbidden' error when attempting to upload a template to the n8n community portal.
applies_when: Using certain JavaScript syntax or special characters
not_this_if: Error occurs without using specific JS syntax or special characters
root_cause: The n8n template portal is protected by Cloudflare's Web Application Firewall (WAF), which may block requests containing certain strings or patterns that resemble attack payloads. This includes specific JavaScript template literals, optional chaining, and special characters.
fix_steps: Inspect the JSON of the workflow for any JavaScript syntax or special characters that may trigger WAF rules.
Make minimal edits to remove or alter these patterns.
Attempt to upload the modified template again.
agent_instruction: Inspect and modify the workflow JSON to avoid triggering WAF rules before uploading.
